payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded, so it should not be presented as current.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new and excluded mem_old because mem_old is marked as superseded by a newer durable memory record

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context identified Sam from Goldman, and among matching records mem_new is the non-superseded current record; mem_old was excluded due to supersession metadata.

memory_cards.statement: For the query about Sam from Goldman, recall selected mem_new as the current applicable memory and filtered mem_old because mem_old has been superseded.

details: Did not present superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or correct the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add disambiguating entity details before recall.
